mapper.insert: INSERT INTO asset_lineage_menu_tmp (id, name, parent_id, component_url, component_type, app_id, app_code, app_name, order_idx) SELECT pi.id, pi.name, pi.parent_id, pi.component_url, pi.component_type, ai.id, ai.code, ai.name, pi.order_idx FROM manager.application_info ai JOIN manager.permission_info pi ON ai.id = pi.app_id
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT app_name, app_code FROM asset_lineage_menu_tmp ORDER BY app_name
SELECT id, name, parent_id, component_url, component_type, app_id, app_code, app_name FROM asset_lineage_menu_tmp WHERE app_code = #{appCode} ORDER BY parent_id, order_idx

SELECT id, name, parent_id, component_url, component_type, app_id, app_code, app_name FROM asset_lineage_menu_tmp WHERE component_url IN
#{url}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO asset_lineage_unmatched_menu (id, project_code, we_location, api_resource_id, creator, create_time, updater, update_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{projectCode}, #{weLocation}, #{apiResourceId}, #{creator}, #{createTime}, #{updater}, #{updateTime})
